name: BladeX PvP Practice Map
description: The map allows you to practice different PvP gamemodes against bots. You can customize kits and change different settings for both the bots and the map.

name: Ancxliy Pack V7
description: This pack also introduces new variants for many blocks such as grass, leaves, stone, planks, flowers, and more, giving every area its own unique character. Exploring the world becomes more satisfying and visually exciting.

name: Beautifully Better Grass
description: Beautifully Better Grass adds subtle flowers and texture variants to terrain blocks, making your Minecraft Bedrock world feel more alive and natural, without changing the vanilla feel.

name: Hotbar Slot Button
description: This resource pack adds new buttons that act like hotbars. Each button changes the held item depending on the button,

name: Minecraft Panorama
description: 🟩 Turned a Minecraft-inspired comic-style loading screen concept into a custom Bedrock Global Resource Pack panorama featuring Zombie, Skeleton, Creeper, Enderman, Steve, Alex, and a custom Panorama logo. 🔥👑⚡

name: Akatsuki cloud
description: The dawn rises on a new generation of outcasts. Akatsuki Cloud brings the most iconic rogue aesthetic to your favorite archetypes, reimagining diverse characters draped in the infamous black cloak and crimson clouds.

name: Bedrock UI+
description: A brand new ui Overhauled from hud+, this ui improves a lots of ui screens, also have so many features that Will helps you in gameplay, such as survival, PVP, etc.

name: Emeralds To Rubies
description: Emeralds to Rubies is a vanilla-styled resource pack that replaces emerald-themed textures with beautiful ruby versions while keeping the classic Minecraft feel intact.

name: FPS Booster | No Lag & Fps Boost
description: This is one of the best performance-boosting packs for Minecraft Pocket Edition, optimized to give you the maximum possible FPS and seamless performance. Whether you're on version 1.16 or 1.21 , this pack works like OptiFine for MCPE—but better. No other pack can match its speed and efficiency. It Is Made For Maximum Fps boost.

name: Toggle Night Vision
description: Want to see caves but too lazy to get torches? This pack makes easier for you to see in dark places without them!

name: Java Subtitles
description: This texture pack repositions the current Closed Caption feature recently added on Minecraft Preview 26.0.5 and moves it at the bottom left corner, similar to Minecraft Java.

name: Pause Screen Fixer
description: Swaps the marketplace button with the settings button.

name: Cape Physics Resource Pack
description: This resource pack ONLY modifies the cape animation and does not add capes. Meaning you have to equip the Pan Cape, Mojang Cape, Cherry Blossom cape or any capes that are already in the game.

name: Pure Optimizer V2
description: Boost Optimizer V2 is a high-performance utility pack designed to maximize your frame rates while delivering a sleek, competitive edge. Whether you’re running on a low-end rig or just want the smoothest gameplay possible for high-stakes PvP, this pack strips away the lag and optimizes your visuals for pure efficiency.

name: Amixi Practice
description: This is Amixi Practice, a practice map which contains most of the stuff you need to train and improve.

name: Simple Status Bar
description: Easily track player health and armor with a sleek, minimalist overhead UI. Designed to be clean and unobtrusive, this pack gives you a competitive edge without cluttering your screen.

name: That's Not My Villager
description: Your job as a doorman is to allow or deny access to applicants seeking entry to your building. You will use tenants' documents and information to determine whether the applicant is truly a villager or not.

name: Enhanced 16x - FPS Booster And Better Visuals
description: Enhanced 16x is a Optimised FPS booster texture pack with enhancing textures of essential items.It removes background features to optimize game and visuals.

name: Animated Menu: Lonely Night Train
description: A quiet night. An empty train. A cinematic anime-style background that turns your Minecraft main menu into something you actually want to stare at. Lonely Night Train brings a moody, atmospheric lofi aesthetic to every time you launch the game.

name: y Better Low Fire's
description:
Make Fire Better and Lower
Also makes it clearer

name: Medieval Structures
description: Medieval Structures is a Minecraft Bedrock add-on that adds dozens of new medieval structures to your world, powered by our own Feudal Furniture add-on!

name: BlueMods Optimization
description: Want more FPS and a cleaner look? This pack removes annoying particles, gives you a sleek dark interface, and cleans up world generation. Great for low-end PCs and mobile or if you just hate visual clutter. Game feels way smoother.

name: Dark UI Transparent
description: Designed for players who prefer a dark, minimal, and aggressive look, the Red UI Pack gives Minecraft Bedrock a sleek dark transparent interface that feels modern and immersive. Every UI element is refined to reduce visual clutter while keeping everything sharp and readable—perfect for both Survival and PvP gameplay.

name: phosphor - Optimizer
description: This is one of the best optimization pack of Minecraft Bedrock & Pocket. This pack is focused on increasing FPS and various features. This pack has 35 Features and it's very lightweight too! So, If you want to double your FPS, This would be best for you!

name: Cute Turtle Helmet
description: Turn your turtle shell into a cute turtle with jiggle physics

name: Utility HUD
description:
Utility HUD (PC & Mobile)
It's an inventory overlay pack that adds some QoL features (PvP focused) in HUD. This type of packs were previously only possible on touch devices. But now it's possible thanks to T1M0THY's Discovery

name: RG Shader
description: RG Shader Is A Texture Pack Based Shader Which Animated All grass ,Leafs To Match With Real Life .It also Adds Fogs which create A light Scatter effect. Overall it is best for those who can't use vibrant visuals and don't use patch . We Recommend You To Use This .Give It A Try.

name: Ultimate Vein Miner
description: Enhance your resource gathering in Minecraft with this all-in-one addon that combines Tree Capitator and Vein Miner. Instantly chop entire trees with one swing and mine full ore veins effortlessly, saving time and effort. It also has leaf capitator with loot system.

name: Warriors Client
description: Warriors' Client is a powerful and feature-packed modification for Minecraft PE, carefully designed to enhance your gameplay, streamline item management, and boost performance — all while giving you a competitive edge on the battlefield.

name: Pure Optimizer
description: Say goodbye to lag and hello to smooth gameplay! This ultimate optimization pack is crafted to deliver maximum performance in Minecraft Pocket Edition (MCPE) and Bedrock Edition (BE).

name: Less Instrutuve chat
description: doesn't cover your screen and frees it up alot of space. Idk what category would it be. Could be helpful in pvp. As a utility. I think It's all category. Survival, utility,pvp

name: Alya Ui
description: Alya Ui Is a animated ui for Minecraft pe/ be it adda alya anime wallpaper to start screen and ads pink theme to game .Best for anime lovers . Why use boring minecraft ui when you got a new flavour.

name: Origin Animation
description: This Animation Packs Enhances Minecraft with New animations. There are Now Only 30 animations which is few and I am able To get this done by help of Ender1000 and Thekidsky 'a animation packs . This is being made to compete with actions and Stuff  . I want your suggestion for improving this . please Comment

name: Re-imagined Intro
description: Re-imagined Intro is a resource pack that adds a smooth and animated intro experience to Minecraft Bedrock Edition, giving the game a fresh and modern appearance before reaching the main menu.

name: Clear Water | FPS Booster
description: Clear Water FPS Booster makes Minecraft Bedrock water cleaner, clearer, and easier to play around on low-end devices.

name: Balanced Clear Ocean
description: Tired of murky, dark oceans that make it impossible to explore? Or maybe you've tried "clear water" packs that just make the ocean look like empty, invisible air? Balanced Clear Ocean is the perfect middle ground. It gives you the crystal-clear visibility you need for ocean monuments, shipwrecks, and coral reefs, while keeping a realistic, beautiful underwater atmosphere.

name: DYNAMIC VIEW
description:
By installing this texture, your world will look more beautiful and dynamic.
You can set the shader level in the settings beforehand.
Don’t forget to enable Vibrant Visual to make this texture even more dynamic.

name: No Lava Fog: Fire Resistance Edition
description: Conquer the absolute worst hazard the Nether has to offer. Navigating the massive, boiling oceans of the Underworld has historically been a blind death sentence. The moment your head slips beneath the surface, the game engine traps you in a thick, suffocating orange wall of blindness.

name: Animated Menu: Summer Pause
description: Take a break from the heat with the Summer Pause resource pack. Transform your main menu into a nostalgic, sun-drenched sanctuary that captures the essence of a quiet afternoon.

name: Raiyon's Java Combat
description: Have you ever wanted your Bedrock experience to be closer to Java? Well if so, this addon is for you! This addon adds a combat system quite faithful to Java

name: Raiyon's Item Physics
description: This addon adds more immersive physics to your Minecraft world, making items on the ground appear realistic and allowing you to pick them up at will.

name: Kraftoid's Modern Furniture
description: Kraftoid's Modern Furniture Addon returns — now with 50 furniture choices (including 100 color varieties), survival mode compatible and interactable! Staying true and free for Bedrock community!

name: Alylica's Dungeons
description: Alylica's Dungeons takes Items, Monsters and more from Minecraft Dungeons and adds it into the game in a Vanilla way, aiming to blend the two games into one!

name: Survival Overhaul
description: Survival Overhaul is a complete resource pack designed to improve every aspect of survival gameplay in Minecraft Bedrock. Instead of stacking multiple packs, this single pack combines essential survival features into one clean, polished experience.

name: Armor Durability Viewer
description: This resource pack displays the durability of your armor and offhand items on inventory screen. It's still not possible to display it on Hud screen with just resource pack.

name: Hololess Angel
description: As a reward for her good deeds, a little girl materialized and presented the "Angel Without a Halo" with a well-deserved crown of flowers.

name: Capytator — All-In-One Collector
description: Capytator is a feature-rich QoL add-on for Minecraft Bedrock that automates tedious manual tasks — from felling a tree to integrated auto-smelting. Spend less time grinding and more time building.

name: Cute Hello Kitty totem of undying
description: your totem texture will change to a cute Hello Kitty texture like in the photo

name: Third Person NameTag
description: A lightweight Bedrock mod that enables your personal name-tag to render perfectly whenever you switch to third-person view.

name: No Dupe Bundles
description: Are you tired seeing your players dupe such as bundles?, No worrys we have a solution for it by download this pack.

name: Shield Checker
description: lightweight resource pack for Minecraft Bedrock Edition that gives your shield a visual status indicator, letting you instantly see whether your shield is active or on cooldown.

name: VDX: Java/Desktop UI
description: Convert base game interface to Java Edition interface style! Of course, not all screens were modified, but I will add more in future versions!

name: Smooth & Colorful Fonts
description: This Resource packs Adds Custom Smooth Font which looks clear and smooth and fits The Classic Minecraft Ui.

name: Paddings Remover
description: In the v1.21.100 update, Mojang tried adjusting the spacing of the selectors on Settings screen. However, the distance between the selectors was too wide, which many players disliked. That's why I'm making this a temporary fix until Mojang fixes it.

name: Effects Overlay
description: With this pack enabled, you can see effects duration directly on HUD.

name: PURE AMBIANCE
description: Pure Ambiance is a Minecraft Bedrock add-on with 799 custom sounds. It overhauls the game with biome-specific ambient noises, dynamic weather and cave audio, and an eerie End loop for total immersion.

name: End Magic
description: Conquer the world with your ferocious End Magic! Use your new and unique teleportation abilities to trample those who defy you and also use it to escape whenever you feel you're cornered!

name: Animated Menu: Girl Behind Curtains
description: Are you tired of the same old, static Minecraft panorama? Animated Menu: Girl Behind Curtain is a high-quality resource pack designed to overhaul your main menu experience.

name: Kawaii x Gothic Pack
description: Whether you want to dominate in BedWars wearing pastel pink platform boots or rock a moody, oversized black hoodie in SkyWars, this pack has the perfect look for you.

name: Find Out
description: Find Out is a Minecraft psychological horror map in which the main character drops off his friend, Arrafy, at school.

name: Prizma Visuals Legacy (Vibrant Visuals Pack Deferred)
description: PrizmaVisuals is a Vibrant Visuals Pack for Minecraft Bedrock

name: Ultramarine Nightfall
description: Ultramarine Nightfall — A moody and atmospheric visual expansion for Minecraft Bedrock 1.21 . Nightfall introduces deeper shadows, cool-toned lighting, and refined UI touches that transform the game into a calm, dusk-inspired world.

name: Survival Suburban House #50
description: sharing a collection of houses that are fully playable in survival mode. Each one is themed according to its surrounding biome—so stay tuned for a variety of unique and exciting builds in future uploads!

name: Eyes the Horror Game
description: This is a horror survival map inspired by Eyes The Horror Game. Escape the cursed mansion while avoiding the AI ghost! Use your eyes to locate danger and survive!

name: Verity - Bedrock Edition
description: A little helper friend but don't ask him about the village in the east and don't leave him...

name: Craftopia Furniture | +2000 BLOCKS
description: Craftopia Furniture is an Add-On that adds more than 2,000 new blocks to Minecraft Bedrock, covering all kinds of blocks, categories, and colors.

name: Vanilla Waypoints
description: A fully functional add-on that allows you to create and manage waypoints in your Minecraft world, with the ability to teleport to them at any time!

name: OptiDark
description: A feature-packed optimization resource pack that improves FPS, reduces lag, removes unnecessary particles and animations, adds useful UI enhancements, and includes PvP-focused quality-of-life features.

name: Full Grass MC
description: Removes the ugly dirt sides from terrain blocks

name: Animatika
description: This texture pack only bring the Java combat animation, not the actual cooldown mechanics! So you can still play Bedrock PvP but with the Java weapon combat animation.

name: Crosshairs Collection Pack
description: Crosshair Pack — 22 Custom Styles for Minecraft Bedrock. Take full control of your aim with this crosshair collection pack featuring 22 unique crosshair styles.

name: Better on Bedrock v1.2.1
description: Better on Bedrock is a comprehensive expansion project designed to enhance and extend the Minecraft: Bedrock Edition experience.

name: Multiplayer Waypoint System!
description: Create waypoints for quick teleportation! Public waypoints system with "my favorites" list! Each player can have and publish up to 999 waypoints! The number of players online is unlimited! Compatible with any addons! Cool camera effects when teleporting!

name: The Ty-el's Settings Overlay UI Pack
description: Adds some magical screen properties and tweaks to the in-game Minecraft Settings Screen to get Camera Perspective toggle on HUD, FOV slider and Quick Toggle, and more!

name: Edds' VeinCapitator
description: Have you wanted to be able to chop down trees in one break? Or maybe, you want to mine coal, but it would take too long? Say no more! with Edds' VeinCapitator you can do both! (up to a 1000 block limit) This comes with vein miner and tree capitator!

name: One Block
description: You start with a single block floating in the sky. Breaking that block slowly expands the world and unlocks new blocks, mobs and structures.

name: Raiyon's Tree Chopper / Capitator
description: Tired of spending too much time felling trees? If so, this addon is for you, adding a fast and dynamic tree felling mechanic

name: Dragon Evolution (Dragon Ball Add-on)
description: Awaken your inner power, overcome incredible challenges, and face fearsome enemies from the Dragon Ball universe.

name: Animated RGB GUI
description: A UI pack to make an animated RGB (Or Chroma) XP bar, hotbar, and Inventory screens!

name: More Simple Structures
description: The More Simple Structures Addon adds a ton of new naturally spawning structures to the game. These structures range from small ruins to large Jungle Pyramids!

name: Bedrock Essentials+
description: Bedrock Essentials adds popular addons like Tree Capitator & Vein Miner. This is an all in one pack for Minecraft Bedrock Edition!

name: Essential menu
description: The ultimate all-in-one UI for your server or Realm! Players get TPA, Mail, Multi-Homes, and Ranks. Admins get in-game config for Kits, Warps, Chat Filters, and Auto-Moderation. Ditch the command blocks and manage everything with ease!..

name: Feather Essentials
description: An amazing Minecraft: Bedrock Edition Add-on to make your Minecraft server fun for your players, and easier on yourself.

name: Server Essential MENU
description: Server Essential MENU is the ultimate, all-in-one Minecraft Bedrock add-on designed to power up your server with a premium suite of features. From administrative suites to dynamic economy systems, competitive clan wars to immersive mini-games—this add-on delivers a high-performance, responsive experience.

name: BlueMods Essential+
description: An all-in-one Minecraft Bedrock addon designed to provide essential for both Realms and dedicated servers.

name: Java Attack Cooldown Indicator
description: shows java style attack cooldown Indicator (no bugs)

name: Bedrock Tweaked
description: Tweakes Bedrock Edition in many ways!

name: Improved BossBars
description: Improved BossBars is a clean, high-quality UI resource pack that upgrades the look of boss health bars in Minecraft. It features custom-designed boss bars for the Ender Dragon, Wither, and Pillager Raid

name: Whiteout pack
description: Whiteout Pack is a clean and stylish Minecraft skin pack with a bright white, icy aesthetic. The skins feature soft white outfits, cool winter-inspired details, and a mysterious monochrome look that stands out in any world.

name: Animated Menu: Nissan GT-R R34 Skyline
description: The Nissan GT-R R34 Skyline drifts through a neon-lit tunnel on your Minecraft menu. Glowing racing graphics, sharp automotive render, smooth animated loop. UI-only pack, zero gameplay impact.

name: Cherry Blossom Hotbar
description: A small GUI resource pack that redesigns the hotbar with a Cherry Blossom theme.

name: Raiyon's Dynamic Lightning
description: Tired of searching for coal and making stacks of torches to light a cave? Well if so this addon is for you adding dynamic lighting

name: SERP Pokédrock (Pokémon Addon)
description: Welcome to the world of Pokédrock! This addon have a battle system, mounts, a lot of mechanics and real evolutions. If you want to enjoy the full experience of the addon, install all resource packs!

name: Dark Fantasy Visuals
description: Dark Fantasy Visuals is a Minecraft Vibrant Visuals pack which reimagines the world with the moody atmosphere of Elden Ring and Dark Souls.

name: Real FPS Counter
description: Welcome to the Real FPS Counter page! If you've been looking for a clean, reliable way to see your frame rate in Minecraft Bedrock or Pocket Edition, this is easily the smartest and most accurate FPS counter you will find out there.

name: Clear Glass texture Pack
description: The best Clear glass texture pack. Adds multiple amazing textures for glass and glass pane. It includes clear and Borderless Glass, Clear Glass and Borderless Glass. Compatible with all other resource packs! doesn't cause any lag.

name: Small Items
description: This pack makes all the tools and items in Minecraft smaller so that they cover less of your screen and give you a clearer and cleaner view while playing.

name: Rainbow Outline Selection
description: Tired of the boring vanilla outline? Rainbow Outline Selection replaces it with a vibrant animated rainbow effect for a more beautiful and immersive Bedrock experience.

name: Enchantment Glint Customizer
description: Allows you to customize the enchantment glint color and adds the option for a smoother glint.

name: Delight 4x4 Texture Pack
description: A low-res beautiful texture pack makes your Minecraft world not only lag free but enhances the textures and look. With the 4x4 texture pack, the world looks like a miniblock world. Cool thing it also adds new 4x4 Ui/GUI.

name: Titanium Add-on
description: A complete Titanium progression tier for Minecraft Bedrock — mine it, smelt it, forge it, and upgrade it into endgame Titanium+ gear via the Titanium Workbench.

name: Forgotten Ghoul
description: Ancient souls with obsidian eyes, haunting the urban decay.

name: FIXED Item Animations
description: This fixes all item animations to match past versions or whatever you need.

name: Animated Honey Pie UI
description: Animated Honey Pie — Step into a vibrant world of sweet energy and whimsical charm with this lively, character-filled interface designed to bring a playful celebration to your screen.

name: Animated Gojo VS Sukuna UI
description: Animated Gojo VS Sukuna — A dramatic clash of cyan and crimson energy as limitless power meets cursed fury, transforming your Minecraft start screen into a cinematic battle experience.

name: Dark Fantasy
description:
[Translated By DeepL]: 
A simple expansion that adds new fantasy creatures to your world!

name: Forsaken Odyssey
description: Explore and survive in a world of wilderness and fantasy. Encounter new mobs on your journey, build your base with new blocks, and discover items to enhance your survival skills!

name: Mythical Biomes
description: Mythical Biomes is an add-on that introduces new biomes to your world, creating a fantasy-like environment. It includes new mobs, features, and blocks.

name: Orbital Railgun
description: The Orbital Railgun Port which brings one of Java Edition’s most iconic modded weapons into Bedrock Edition.

name: Effortless Building
description: Effortless Building brings Java's favourite multi-block placement mod to Bedrock! Place walls, floors, spheres, cylinders & more in seconds.

name: Revive Me!
description: When you die you now have a second chance by getting Knocked Down, you can get revived by your friends.

name: Chroma Shader
description: Best Non-patch Shader for MCPE & Bedrock!

name: Bedrock Reimagined
description: Explore a reimagined Minecraft Bedrock experience with a new gameplay loop; defeat bosses to get to the end. Use magic, new weapons and tools, and your skill to defeat the game!

name: ASMR - Mechanical Keyboard Sounds
description: Replaces Minecraft's default sounds with 800+ real mechanical keyboard click recordings — footsteps, block breaking/placing, combat, armor, potions, and more.

name: Animated Hatsune Miku UI
description: Animated Hatsune Miku — Step into a world of vibrant rhythm and digital melody. With bright teal hues and a lively atmosphere, this interface captures the iconic charm and musical spirit of a superstar, turning your menu into a cheerful stage.

name: Dreamy Visuals
description: This new update to the Dreamy pack is infinitely better than the previous one; you could say it now rivals the Vibrant Visuals packs on the Marketplace

name: Survival Town House #63
description: Welcome to my 63rd house in the Survival Series! 🏠✨

name: Teddy Bear Hotbar
description: A cute and cozy resource pack that redesigns the hotbar with a brown teddy bear theme.

name: New Weapons Overhaul
description: New Weapons Overhaul adds powerful, custom weapons with cinematic particle abilities, unique hit effects, and crafted recipes. Expect dramatic visuals, signature animations, and a dark-fantasy arsenal built for Bedrock.

name: More Vanilla Weapons Complete
description: If you're looking to expand your combat arsenal in Minecraft while keeping the game’s classic vanilla feel, the More Vanilla Weapons+ mod series is perfect for you.

name: Animated SilverWolf UI
description: Animated Silver Wolf — Dive into a high-tech digital frontier. Bathed in striking neon violet and electric cyan, this cybernetic interface captures the mischievous confidence of a master hacker, perfect for a sleek, immersive menu aesthetic.

name: Flamingo Visuals
description: Flamingo Vibrant Visual Shader

name: The Lucky Sky
description: In this map you'll have to survive in a sky block, but with lucky blocks!!

name: Survival Sandy Cheeks House #65 (Achievements On)
description: Welcome to my 65th house in the Survival Series! 🏠✨

name: Structures Plus
description: Structures Plus is a Minecraft Bedrock add-on focused on adding new, immersive structures to your world while staying true to the vanilla experience.

name: Pet Furniture
description: Pet Furniture is an Add-On for Minecraft Bedrock that adds furniture and decorations for various types of animals.

name: Dragon Mounts 2
description: Raise, tame, breed, and ride powerful dragons while exploring new nests, collecting unique dragon eggs, crafting specialized equipment, and expanding your Minecraft Bedrock survival adventure with 17 unique dragon species.

name: Movie Posters
description: Decorate your Minecraft worlds with placeable movie posters featuring famous films, perfect for cinemas, bedrooms, game rooms, and other creative builds.

name: Health Bar Indicator
description: See every mob's health at a glance! Health Bar Indicator adds a dynamic, color-coded HP bar above every mob in your world.

name: Eatable Items
description: This Addon Added 200 Eatable Items In Minecraft!!! This includes weapons, armors, and so much more!!

name: Better Fps
description: Better FPS is a performance focused resource pack for Minecraft Bedrock Edition that boosts your FPS without changing the core vanilla look. Less lag, smoother gameplay, and useful quality-of-life features, all in one lightweight pack.

name: Rise and Survive – Progressive Zombie Apocalypse.
description: Rise and Survive is a progressive apocalyptic survival addon where zombies evolve, hordes intensify, and the world becomes deadlier the longer you stay alive.

name: Food Stats
description: Shows hunger, saturation & effects on food items

name: BACKROOMS THE FORGOTTEN COMPLEX
description: If you're not careful and you noclip out of reality in the wrong areas, you'll end up in the Backrooms, where it's nothing but the stink of old moist carpet, the madness of mono-yellow

name: The Boy In The Bath
description: This addon is not a port | it's an addon that draws inspiration from many popular mods like The Idol, Twixxel's Stalkers, etc.

name: Better Bushy Leaves
description: Better Bushy Leaves is a lightweight visual resource pack for Minecraft Bedrock Edition that transforms flat, blocky leaves into lush, bushy foliage, now with gentle falling leaf particles drifting from every tree.

name: Dynamic Capitator
description: 9 smart breaking tools in one menu — Vein Miner, Tree Capacitor, Crop Harvester, Leaf Shears, Sugar Cane, Bamboo, Kelp, Cactus, and All Blocks. Fortune supported. Achievement friendly.

name: Hide Helmet Armor
description: Hide player helmet without take off the helmet

name: Simple Waystone
description: A simple addon to help you travel across large distances or dimensions using the magic of teleport.

name: PandaMine's Better Low Fire
description: Extremely customizable Low FIre texture pack that lowers fire on your screen & lowers fire overlay transparency. Significantly improves overall Survival and PvP experience.

name: Better Water Animation
description:
**⚡**Better Water Animation**

Adds smooth, visuals and clear water that appear naturally around the player, enhancing the visual quality of every water interaction.

📸 Follow us for updates, new versions, and upcoming packs!
